creator: c0rn@o2.pl
text:
While everything goes fine (I installed through pkg_add -r) this port
fails to register as a valid java enviroment to the system. It looks
like it needs run dependency on java/javavmwrapper. It tries to
register/unregister by using registervm(1) / unregistervm(1) from
this missing dependency package.

 It seems that java/openjdk6 has this dependency and probably works
fine (I didn't test it).
